hero.qualifier1: If you run a business you want to grow,
hero.qualifier3: You feel you should be earning more, but something is holding you back
hero.qualifier4: You've heard about AI and new technologies, but you wonder — How is this supposed to work for me?
hero.badNews: we have bad news. You're like most people.
hero.goodNews: We also have good news. We can probably help. With zero risk of paying for something that doesn't work.
hero.valueProp: We automate operational processes in companies with a few to 100 employees and increase their revenue without hiring new people.
hero.guarantee: If we don't see real savings potential in your business — we won't start working together, and you pay nothing.

problems.title: Where is your money going?
problems.stat: In most companies, 20–60% of working time is wasted on tasks that can be automated.
problems.item4: Processes dependent on a single person
problems.framing: These aren't "small tasks." They're a constant cost that grows with your company and directly reduces your margin.
problems.hook: The faster you grow, the bigger the operational chaos and the less control you have — sound familiar?

guarantee.headline: We don't implement AI for show.
guarantee.headline2: We implement it so you profit from day one.
guarantee.badge: Our guarantee — no profit, no payment.
guarantee.description: We don't sell tools or technology that works for others but not for you. We design a system that works in your business model and delivers measurable financial results.
guarantee.step4: We measure real time and cost savings
guarantee.proof: Companies with just a few employees that implement automation with us reduce operational costs by an average of 180,000 PLN per year within the first 8–12 months.

riskReversal.title: Why is your risk 0%?
riskReversal.step1Text: We start with a free analysis of one operational process. This is where we tell you whether we can help. You pay nothing at this stage.
riskReversal.step2Text: We show you where money is really leaking and what the savings potential is. You decide whether our solutions are beneficial for you. At this stage, you know how much you'll approximately earn.
riskReversal.closing: If we can't generate measurable value — we don't take on the project.
riskReversal.transparency: We sell financial results that you calculate yourself. Everything transparent. No hidden costs.

benefits.title: What do you gain?
benefits.item5: Ability to scale without hiring more people or increasing costs
benefits.closing: Automation doesn't replace people — it replaces boring, repetitive work.

qualification.title: Do you qualify?
qualification.item2: You want to grow your business, but you feel the chaos and lack of control
qualification.item3: You have repetitive administrative, sales, or reporting processes
qualification.item4: You don't want to build a separate IT department
qualification.item5: You want to increase profits without hiring more people or increasing costs
qualification.techItem: If your company runs on emails, documents, CRM, and repetitive tasks with sales reps, you have real automation potential.

cta.headline: Same team. Greater scale. Higher financial results.
cta.description: If your people are constantly busy with no time for growth — the problem isn't the team. The problem is a lack of tools that other companies use to grow.
cta.subtext: Find out how much you can really recover in the next 12 months

footer.description: We automate operational processes in companies and increase their revenue without hiring new people.
